description_long: This shotgun features a robust black metal barrel with visible venting along the top and a prominent muzzle brake at the front. The stock and fore-end are crafted from a warm, polished wood, providing a classic and ergonomic grip. The receiver area is detailed with mechanical components, including a visible pump mechanism beneath the barrel. The shotgun has a full-length ribbed barrel, and the wooden stock is contoured for shoulder support. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, offering protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. Overall, the design combines traditional materials with functional, tactical elements suitable for urban environments.
description: A black metal shotgun with a vented barrel, wooden stock, and a visible pump mechanism, blending classic and tactical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, vented barrel, and the narrow profile of the wooden stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the ribbed barrel, wooden stock, and the pump mechanism beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and pump.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing and a prominent muzzle brake
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
